recentTweets.text:
RT @HouseDemocrats: Over 4 million Americans have lost food assistance because of Trump and Republicans' Big Ugly Bill.

People will go hun…

Every family deserves a place to call home.

I visited the new ARCHES Nest, a transitional housing shelter for families in Marion and Polk counties.

In Congress, I’m working to strengthen programs that help folks build stability and move toward self-sufficiency. https://t.co/siGe25pQEY

One year after the Big Ugly Bill became law, Oregon families are still paying the price.

Republicans took away food assistance from the people who need it the most — leaving children, seniors, and veterans with nowhere to turn.

RT @HouseAgDems: Rural hospitals are closing left and right, and it will only worsen because of Republican attacks on health care.  
 
Clos…

The bipartisan housing bill will become law tonight — with our without President Trump’s signature.

His refusal to support legislation that gives Americans a fair shot at homeownership speaks volumes about where everyday Americans fall on his priority list.

When we invest in outdoor spaces, we invest in community.

It was a pleasure to be in Dundee to celebrate the official opening of Sander Estate Park — a project rooted in our history, shaped by our neighbors, and made possible through partnership at every level of government. https://t.co/7qJDU4p9qt
RT @HouseDemocrats: The American people are struggling while Donald Trump is using the power of his office to enrich himself and his family…
https://t.co/iLdnWGzaoc

The 14th Amendment was ratified on this day in 1868, guaranteeing birthright citizenship and ensuring equal protection under the law for all.

Donald Trump's effort to end birthright citizenship was a FAILED attempt to weaken this Amendment and unravel its clear protections.

Food banks like Ella Curran are built on a simple belief: no one in our community should go hungry.

I helped secure $775,000 in federal funding for their new facility in Independence, and it was an honor to speak at the groundbreaking to celebrate the incredible work that made https://t.co/2FuP3LpaAY

Public servants should work for the people, not for profits.

That is why I hold no stocks — and why I introduced legislation to stop any sitting president from insider trading.
https://t.co/gipeJTZOHL

I was proud to speak at the ribbon-cutting of the newest public library in the country! 📚

Keizer Community Library has earned its official public library designation, and it will now join Oregon's cooperative library system, expanding access to books, materials, and resources https://t.co/9njptoEGBQ
RT @RepLiccardo: I enjoyed welcoming my colleagues from the @NewDemCoalition to Silicon Valley for thoughtful conversations about AI, workf…

Trump called affordable housing a “big yawn,” which is bold coming from someone that gets caught sleeping in so many of his public appearances.

Meanwhile, families are losing sleep wondering how to make ends meet. The crisis is real, even if Trump is dreaming. https://t.co/bGORti5Mwt

Woodburn is officially a 2026 All-America City! 🇺🇸

This award recognizes how our city leans into diversity, strengthens democracy through collaboration, and builds a welcoming community worthy of America’s 250th anniversary milestone.

Congratulations, Woodburn!

Republicans’ Big Ugly Bill made the largest cuts to Medicaid in history and took away SNAP from hungry children, seniors, and veterans.

One year later, I am still proud I voted NO. I’ll never support legislation that asks working families to sacrifice just to enrich the

Congress passed bipartisan legislation that would make housing more affordable.

The bill is on President Trump’s desk, but he won’t sign it. My colleagues and I have a simple message for him: Sign the damn bill. https://t.co/7KNZdAKqDJ

July is BIPOC Mental Health Awareness Month — a reminder that mental health struggles don’t look the same in every community.

As a Latina and co-chair of the Mental Health Caucus, I’m fighting to reduce stigma, grow the mental health workforce, and make culturally competent care

Today we celebrate America’s 250th birthday 🇺🇸

But it is also the one-year anniversary of Republicans’ Big Ugly Bill, an un-American law that made people sicker, hungrier, and poorer.

As proud Americans, we must strive to move our nation forward, not backwards.

Happy Fourth! Wishing everyone a safe and happy holiday 🇺🇸

As we mark 250 years since our founding, we remember the enduring promise that all people are created equal — and the generations who marched and sacrificed to make that promise real.

Today, we recommit ourselves to a

I’m leading 24 lawmakers in demanding the Trump Administration withdraw its unfair and unlawful annual asylum fee rule.

This policy would destabilize hundreds of thousands of people, harm key industries, and undermine fundamental legal protections.
https://t.co/czah1qPXUd

CORRUPTION ALERT 🤑 Trump has profited at least $2.2 BILLION through his meme coin, suspicious stock trades, and other conflicts of interest.

THIS IS WRONG.

My new bill would tax the hell out of this corruption at ONE HUNDRED PERCENT.

On National Wildland Firefighter Day, we honor those who put their lives on the line to keep us safe.

We must provide them with the resources and support they need to do their jobs and protect our communities. In Congress, I’m working to do just that.
RT @HouseDemocrats: Reminder: Trump and Republicans cut food assistance for 4 million Americans, including nearly ONE MILLION CHILDREN.

Today marks the anniversary of the Civil Rights Act of 1964 — a landmark step towards equality and justice.

We recognize those who fought to make it possible, and we honor them by continuing their important work.
Mr. President, sign the damn bill. https://t.co/9L5fkC6lfc

Thank you to the over 11,000 Oregonians who participated in my telephone town hall last night!

If you missed this event, don't worry… Sign up for my email newsletter for updates about my work in Congress, upcoming events, and more👇
https://t.co/EuBnVLo7FQ
It’s #CleanBeachesWeek 🏖️ The more than 300 miles of the Oregon Coast are a national treasure — and keeping them clean protects wildlife, ocean health, and the beauty we all enjoy 🌊

Medicare began 60 years ago today and has continuously served as a vital lifeline for older Americans.

As Republicans target these programs, I’m committed to defending and strengthening Medicare for generations to come.
No sitting president should be making billions of dollars off of the American people. That is why I am working to put a stop to this nonsense.

Oregon has held safe, fair, and accessible elections by mail for decades.

Hear me chat about how the recent Supreme Court ruling benefits American voters ⤵️ https://t.co/ZPfxoCdGJI
Nearly one year after Trump’s Big UGLY Bill, life for Americans has gotten harder and more expensive.
Don’t forget that I am hosting a telephone town hall TONIGHT at 4 pm PT!

Calling all middle and high school coders! Show off your talent by participating in my Congressional App Challenge 👾

Learn about how to get involved today ⬇️
https://t.co/wP3kfzUi6Z

Pride Month may be coming to a close, but the fight for dignity, safety, and equality continues.

As a proud vice chair of the @EqualityCaucus, my colleagues and I are working to build a more inclusive future for our LGBTQIA+ community members and all Americans.
In a rare moment of honesty, Trump said he doesn’t want housing to be more affordable.

One year after Republicans passed their signature Big Ugly Bill, only billionaires and big corporations are better off.

Meanwhile, hardworking Americans are getting sicker, hungrier, and poorer.

🚨Don’t miss my telephone town hall TOMORROW at 4 pm PT! Tune in to hear more about my work in Congress and share your thoughts.

RSVP ➡️https://t.co/eRrWqCB9FQ

Just dropped a new bill that would stop President Trump, and any sitting president, from insider trading.

Read about my NO PROFIT Act ➡️ https://t.co/gipeJTZOHL https://t.co/LZIDSLD0sW
